_comment: Example S3 deletion configurations using relative paths
_note: All paths are relative to s3://{bucket}/{dataset}/ where bucket and dataset come from SSM parameters

example_crawl_cleanup.description: Clean up crawl results and temporary files

example_all_temp_data.description: Delete all temporary and scratch data

notes: Paths can end with / but it's not required
The Lambda will ensure paths end with / before deletion
